programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a hot one in Moreno Valley, with temperatures reaching the 100s; Kenny fights the heat by providing everyone with popsicles; Rene brings along his daughter, Tatiana, who needs a math lesson or two; both of Ivy's sons lend a helping hand.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a scorcher in Banning, so Kenny dresses "tropical" in hopes of channeling a Caribbean breeze; Rene is on the hunt for hot collectibles; Ivy can only bring "half" of Isaiah to help; Brandi's newfound Zen energy at the auction doesn't last.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The blazing heat in Riverside inspires Lisa and Kenny to break out the parasols; Dusty wears his intuition on his sleeve; Ivy releases the hounds and makes out nicely as a result.

programme.desc: A wealthy man devises an elaborate hoax to force three people to apologize for humiliating him earlier in his life.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Rex is accused of attacking a decorated former police officer, Charlie enlists the help of an unorthodox ally to uncover the truth in the hopes of restoring Rex's position on the team.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman sells his boat to a young man and believes he's found a good friend and new fishing buddy; the Judges question the friendship when they uncover the details of a $5K bailout loan the young neighbor received from the man.

programme.desc: When a businessman opens a restaurant during COVID, he ends up with theft and a contract dispute.
